federation.change_master.confirm_text: I understand that this operation will migrate all federated users to the new master tenant and cannot be easily undone.
federation.change_master.description: Transfer the master role from the current tenant to another tenant in :group
federation.change_master.selected_info: :tenant will become the new master tenant for this federation group.
federation.change_master.title: Change Master Tenant
federation.change_master.warning: This is a critical operation. All federated users will be migrated to the new master tenant. This may take some time depending on the number of users.
